name: SC-001: Valid Login Redirects to Booking Page
objective: Login to https://katalon-demo-cura.herokuapp.com/ as John Doe with password ThisIsNotAPassword and verify the appointment booking page is displayed.

name: SC-002: Invalid Login Denied
objective: Login to https://katalon-demo-cura.herokuapp.com/ as invalid_user with password wrong_password and verify an error message is displayed indicating the login failed.
healed_from: Login to https://katalon-demo-cura.herokuapp.com/ as invalid_user with password wrong_password and verify access to the portal is denied with an error message.

name: SC-003: Book Appointment Shows Confirmation
objective: Login to https://katalon-demo-cura.herokuapp.com/ as John Doe with password ThisIsNotAPassword, submit the appointment booking form with any valid inputs, and verify the heading 'Appointment Confirmation' is displayed.
healed_from: Login to https://katalon-demo-cura.herokuapp.com/ as John Doe with password ThisIsNotAPassword, complete and submit the appointment booking form, and verify the heading 'Appointment Confirmation' is displayed.

name: SC-004: Facility Reflected on Confirmation
objective: Login to https://katalon-demo-cura.herokuapp.com/ as John Doe with password ThisIsNotAPassword, book an appointment with facility 'Hongkong CURA Healthcare Center' by filling in all required fields and submitting the form, and verify the confirmation page displays 'Hongkong CURA Healthcare Center'.
healed_from: Login to https://katalon-demo-cura.herokuapp.com/ as John Doe with password ThisIsNotAPassword, book an appointment selecting 'Hongkong CURA Healthcare Center' as the facility, and verify the confirmation page displays 'Hongkong CURA Healthcare Center'.

name: SC-005: Navigate to Appointment History
objective: Login to https://katalon-demo-cura.herokuapp.com/ as John Doe with password ThisIsNotAPassword, book an appointment by filling in the appointment form and submitting it, and verify the appointment appears on the history page with a facility name and visit date.
healed_from: Login to https://katalon-demo-cura.herokuapp.com/ as John Doe with password ThisIsNotAPassword, navigate to the appointment history page from the main menu, and verify previously booked appointments are listed with facility name and visit date.
